title: BESPORTBLE Large Plastic Goldfish Bowl, Unbreakable Round Fish Tank, Clear Bubble Vase for Centrepieces, Small Aquarium Terrarium for Home Office Desk Decor, Shatterproof
features: Shatterproof Safety for Peace of Mind: Unlike fragile glass, this robust plastic fish bowl eliminates the risk of dangerous shards. Perfect for households with energetic children or curious pets, providing a secure environment for your aquatic friends without the worry of breakage.

Crystal Clear Viewing Experience: Enjoy a distortion-free, 360-degree view of your fish and plants or decorative arrangements. The high-transparency material offers the elegance of glass with the lightweight resilience of modern PET, enhancing any room's aesthetic.

Versatile DIY Creative Centrepiece: Beyond a habitat for small goldfish or betta, this globe transforms into a stunning hydroponic vase, succulent terrarium, or a stylish candy jar for parties and weddings. A flexible choice for creative home decorators.

Compact & Lightweight Design: Ideal for tight spaces like office desks or bedside tables. Its lightweight construction makes water changes and cleaning effortless compared to heavy glass tanks, saving you time and effort in daily maintenance.

Modern Globe Aesthetic: The round shape complements any interior style. Create a relaxing miniature ecosystem or a vibrant floral display to brighten up your living room, kitchen, or workspace with a touch of nature.
